data.content: Implementation review requested changes. 1. The knot description is the installed 'foolery stop' failure that emits 'printf: ->: invalid option', but the reviewed change only updates [scripts/setup.sh] prompt output at line 67 and [scripts/agent-wizard.sh] prompt output at line 51. 2. The install/generated runtime path that produces the installed 'foolery' script was already using the safe form before this commit: [scripts/install.sh] line 78 and generated line 297 both use printf '%s' '->'. 3. Because the implementation does not modify the stop/install path described by the knot, it does not resolve the reported user-visible failure and there is no regression test covering that path. Required follow-up: change the implementation to address the installed/runtime stop path or the upgrade/reinstall flow that leaves users with the broken script, and add validation for the reported behavior.
